title: Anthelepis guillauminii

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing pain and preventing infections. The bioactive constituents of Anthelepis guillauminii include limonoids, flavonoids, and essential oils, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
